induced_prompt_raw: Generate a grammatically valid sentence containing exactly three levels of nested relative clauses (triply center-embedded), using the structure: [Noun 1] + [Noun 2] + [Noun 3] + [Noun 4] + [Verb 4] + [Verb 3] + [Verb 2] + [Verb 1]. Ensure all four nouns and four verbs are present so the sentence is syntactically complete, avoiding the error of omitting the innermost subject-verb pair.
